requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series for PV Inverters — EAC / ISC Cambodia Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——EAC / ISC柬埔寨要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——EAC / ISC柬埔寨要求

summary.en: Cambodia's standards body, the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC), develops and adopts Cambodian Standards (CS) that progressively align with IEC. For solar PV inverters, EAC grid-connection technical requirements reference IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and the IEC 61000-series (particularly IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission limits) as the applicable EMC framework. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment. No standalone ISC-specific EMC Technical Regulation for solar inverters has been separately enacted — EMC evidence requirements are embedded in the EAC grid-connection and project approval process. ILAC-accredited laboratory test reports are expected for project submissions.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨标准机构——柬埔寨标准院（ISC）制定并采纳柬埔寨标准（CS），逐步与IEC接轨。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，EAC并网技术要求以IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000系列（尤其是IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放限值）为适用EMC框架。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准。目前尚未另行颁布针对太阳能逆变器的独立ISC专项EMC技术法规——EMC证据要求包含在EAC并网和项目审批程序中。项目提交通常要求提供ILAC认可实验室的测试报告。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨標準機構——柬埔寨標準院（ISC）制定並採納柬埔寨標準（CS），逐步與IEC接軌。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，EAC併網技術要求以IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000系列（尤其是IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放限值）為適用EMC框架。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準。目前尚未另行頒布針對太陽能逆變器的獨立ISC專項EMC技術法規——EMC證據要求包含在EAC併網和項目審批程序中。項目提交通常要求提供ILAC認可實驗室的測試報告。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) CS standards adopting IEC — verify adopted EMC standards at isc.gov.kh
EAC grid-connection project approval — EMC evidence requirements embedded in project review

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series methods also referenced in Chinese domestic standards, GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as required by EAC Cambodia project submissions. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Cambodia project submissions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准中也引用的IEC 61000系列方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调，不被EAC柬埔寨项目提交接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为柬埔寨项目提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準中也引用的IEC 61000系列方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調，不被EAC柬埔寨項目提交接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為柬埔寨項目提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy Cambodia EAC project requirements for IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report. These reports should be specific to the inverter model and power rating being supplied to Cambodia. Where harmonic test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V), consider whether retesting under Cambodia grid conditions (230/400 V, 50 Hz) is required by the EAC project reviewer or EDC.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足柬埔寨EAC项目对IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2证据的要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、针对特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。上述报告应针对供应至柬埔寨的逆变器型号和功率等级。若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下获取，应与EAC项目审查员或EDC确认是否需要在柬埔寨电网条件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足柬埔寨EAC項目對IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2證據的要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、針對特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。上述報告應針對供應至柬埔寨的逆變器型號和功率等級。若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得，應與EAC項目審查員或EDC確認是否需要在柬埔寨電網條件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Required for EAC Cambodia grid-connection project submission; IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence are part of EAC/ISC IEC-aligned technical review; ISC CS adoption status should be verified at isc.gov.kh
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Cambodia EAC/ISC requirements for IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project submission to EAC. Confirm whether Cambodia grid voltage conditions (230/400 V) require retesting compared to test results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions. Verify current ISC CS standard adoption status at isc.gov.kh.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足柬埔寨EAC/ISC对IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2证据的要求。在向EAC提交项目前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认柬埔寨电网电压条件（230/400 V）是否需要相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下的测试结果重新测试。请在isc.gov.kh核实当前ISC柬埔寨标准采纳状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足柬埔寨EAC/ISC對IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2證據的要求。在向EAC提交項目前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認柬埔寨電網電壓條件（230/400 V）是否需要相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下的測試結果重新測試。請在isc.gov.kh核實當前ISC柬埔寨標準採納狀態。
